purpose: Give the user a single place to organize an entire trip: day-by-day itinerary, bookings, packing list, and notes.
primaryUserGoal: Plan and reference an upcoming trip without bouncing between apps.
whenHermesShouldChoose: User asks to plan a trip, build a day-by-day itinerary, pack for a destination, or consolidate bookings for an upcoming trip.
goodFor: Packing lists tailored to climate and activities
supports: Tabs: Itinerary (timeline), Bookings (card-grid with images), Packing (checklist), Notes
Per-day timeline items with time and chips
idealDataShape: Day-by-day timeline of activities with times
Bookings: flights, hotels, activities each with an image query

populationInstructions.summary: Create a tabs section with 4 panes (Itinerary, Bookings, Packing, Notes). Itinerary uses timeline items per activity; Bookings uses a card-grid with image.query for hotel/flight; Packing uses checklist; Notes uses notes.
steps: Parse destination, dates, purpose (leisure, business, family).
Build the Itinerary tab as timeline items — one per activity, labeled with day + time.
Build the Bookings tab as a card-grid with one card per reservation (flight, hotel, tours). Use image.query for photos.
Build the Packing tab as a checklist — 10-25 items tailored to climate and activities, no prerequisites needed.
Build the Notes tab for phrases, emergency numbers, visa reminders.
guardrails: Don't pack more than one timeline item per hour unless asked.
Tailor packing to the actual destination climate, not generic lists.

patchPrefer: Use upsert_timeline_items as activities are added or times change
Use upsert_cards to add newly-made bookings
Use set_active_tab when user switches focus
Use append_note_lines for saved links and reminders
